scope: J/K/L group round 3 75 RMB discussion-only candidate and portfolio-logic review
input_files_reviewed: 赔率与投注/购彩方案组合标准_20260625.md

global_top_concerns.concern: All six matches lack T-75 official lineups and final minutes/injury confirmation.
The market chain is incomplete: some ordinary 1X2 markets are missing, same-source totals are missing, and score/total-goals/half-full-time have active flags but no captured odds.
The modeler artifact maps candidates only; it explicitly creates no final tickets, stakes, or portfolio. Any 3-main plus entertainment structure would be premature.
The apparent main-bucket candidates cluster around handicap non-cover or underdog-protection paths, making the portfolio vulnerable to one shared low-margin/favorite-control assumption.

ticket_slot_verdicts.reason: No final legs or stake amounts; all gates remain hold_not_executable.
Potential main bucket is likely handicap-protection/non-cover; correlation matrix not built.
Three main tickets would likely over-concentrate in low-margin/favorite-not-cover assumptions.
Exact-score/HTFT odds missing and high variance.
Total-goals odds missing; no same-source price to evaluate value.
Optional entertainment slot must not be used to add correlated parlay leverage.

correlation_flags: Main-bucket candidates cluster around handicap non-cover or underdog-protection paths.
Colombia +1 win, Croatia -1 loss, Panama +2 win and Jordan +2 win are not independent if the shared assumption is favorite control without margin.
Exact score and HT/FT candidates are narrow path and should not be used to make a portfolio look insured.
No scenario-compatible minimum return or path matrix is present.
required_before_reconsideration: same-source odds for all selected markets
specific ticket legs, stake amounts, odds products and scenario-compatible return matrix
explicit model-bet alignment for every leg

blocking_items: Official live odds chain incomplete and conflicting between sources.
Score, total-goals and HT/FT odds missing.
No final 75 RMB portfolio tickets to audit.
Potential main-bucket structure is correlated around favorite non-cover/low-margin paths.
